title: gussonea konduensis
side_effects: Gussonea konduensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and digestive problems, including nausea and vomiting. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to cardiovascular issues, such as rapid heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. Furthermore, prolonged use without proper guidance can also result in kidney damage and liver strain. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedy to avoid these potential health risks.
